pr.title: Non-record: Entropy-aware Int5-odd BTT-MLP with materialized eval

output.summary: Combines entropy-aware int5_odd quantization with TT/BTT-structured MLPs and eval-time materialization for fast dense validation.
techniques: - Entropy-aware int5_odd training aligned to the exported artifact
- TT/BTT-inspired StructuredLinear for MLP layers while keeping attention dense
- Eval-time materialization contracting the structured MLP into dense weights
